title: ETL & Ingestion
description: The ETL and Ingestion module supports the transformation and loading of source data into OMOP Common Data Model format. Tools for schema mapping, concept mapping, FHIR ingestion, and ETL execution enable data engineers to build reproducible, auditable data pipelines.
tips: Complete schema mapping before concept mapping to ensure source fields are correctly aligned with CDM domain structures.
Use the Source Profiler to understand source data distributions and inform mapping decisions before building ETL logic.
Leverage the FHIR ingestion pathway for sources that expose HL7 FHIR APIs to reduce custom ETL development effort.
Validate concept mapping coverage by reviewing unmapped source codes and resolving high-frequency gaps before production loads.
Monitor ETL job status and error logs in the Jobs Monitoring panel to quickly detect and remediate pipeline failures.
